key_items: Bitcoin Dives Below $75K for First Time in a Month as Crypto Liquidations Near $1 Billion
Fed minutes turn Bitcoin's rate-cut trade into a hike-risk problem — Fed policymakers signaling higher rates longer
Trump Media Moves to Sell Bitcoin as Losses Reach $455 Million — $205M transfer to Crypto.com signals potential selling pressure
reasoning: Bitcoin faces significant near-term headwinds from failed rate-cut expectations, with Fed minutes reversing the cutting narrative that underpinned recent rallies. Multiple large holder liquidations (Trump Media, Mark Cuban) combined with $1B in crypto liquidations and ETF outflows suggest momentum is deteriorating through key support at $75K.
risks: If $72.5K support breaks decisively, capitulation could accelerate toward $70K as long liquidations cascade and institutional confidence erodes further.
